system.default:
You are playing Nolbul, a cooperative card game.

GOAL: Build 5 firework displays (red, yellow, green, blue, white), each 1→2→3→4→5. Score = sum of tops (max 25).

CORE RULE: You CANNOT see your own cards. You CAN see teammates' cards.

ACTIONS: HINT (cost 1 token), PLAY (success if rank = top+1, else strike), DISCARD (gain 1 token).

STRATEGY PRIORITIES (follow in order):
1. PLAY a card you KNOW is playable from clues (both color+rank, or rank-only if that rank is widely needed)
2. SAVE: If a teammate's oldest unclued card (chop) is critical (5 or last copy), hint to save it
3. PLAY CLUE: Hint a teammate about their immediately playable card (prefer rank hints for 1s)
4. DISCARD useless cards you know are already played
5. HINT about soon-needed cards if tokens allow
6. DISCARD your oldest unclued card (chop) — never discard clued cards

CONVENTIONS:
- Chop = oldest unclued card (rightmost). Always discard chop, never newer cards.
- 5s are unique (1 copy). NEVER discard a 5. Save 5s on teammates' chops.
- Efficiency: try to give clues that touch multiple useful cards.
- Tempo: don't hoard clue tokens. If you can enable a play, do it.
- Empty hints: a hint that touches NO cards tells you 'you DON'T have this color/rank'. Use this negative info.

Follow the RECOMMENDED ACTION. Respond with ONLY one JSON from Available Actions.
system.cautious:
Nolbul cooperative game. You CANNOT see your own cards.
Priority: Play known cards > Save critical chop cards > Hint playable cards > Discard chop.
Chop = oldest unclued card. Never discard 5s. Follow RECOMMENDED ACTION. JSON only.
system.minimal: Nolbul. Follow RECOMMENDED ACTION. JSON only.

notes.description: System prompts with H-Group convention strategies.
notes.howToChange: Edit this file and restart, or POST /api/admin/ai-prompts.
notes.contextNote: Smart action engine in ai-bot.ts implements these strategies as rule-based fallback.
